title: John
description: Take a journey into the realm of an ancient villager god - John.
body:
"John" (the mod) so far has added a new dimension, three new mobs, fourteen new items, three new blocks (one having stairs, slabs, and wall variants), and multiple structures spanning across the overworld and John's World.

<u>**The dimension:**</u>
John's World is a vast void sparsely filled with floating islands filled with loot and stuff and also platforms that seemingly have John himself waiting on them.

<u>**The mobs:**</u>
The Nose may look like an ordinary Villager's nose detached from its head, but it is a menacing, speedy, and hard-to-hit little gremlin.

The Witch Nose is even more terrifying than the Nose. They afflict their target with poison on each hit.

John is an ancient deity that was worshiped by villagers long ago. Some of the ancient temples to him are still standing in the overworld. He resides in his dimension where he stands waiting to be disturbed by a mortal being. He seems to get fed up with projectiles really fast...

<u>**The Items:**</u>
The John Shard is an item with suspicious properties crafted down from a John Block and is used to create the Shard and Powder and the John Frame.

The John Nose and John Nose Fragment are pretty self-explanatory. It's John's Nose. The John Nose can be worn in the helmet slot and appears as a villager nose would, but green.

The Raw Nose is a food item dropped by the Nose mob that can be cooked into Cooked Nose. The Raw Nose can be worn in the helmet slot and appears as a villager nose would.

The Shard and Powder is a strange item that can activate a portal to John's World.

John Tools and Weapons are upgraded from Netherite using the proper Upgrade Template and are faster, stronger, and more durable.

<u>**The Blocks:**</u>
The John Block is a block found in the ancient John temples that presumably holds some sort of religious function.

The John Frame is the outline used to form a portal to John's World.

Johnstone is a very dark and stone-like block that is used exclusively in John's spawn platforms.



Special thanks to [Henwy](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=njVOGU-AWqQ) and [JeromeASF](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6JMOvVZvtco) for making videos featuring this mod.
